PowerShell($excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $excel.DisplayAlerts = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("D:\\aq\\ix\\MartinDow\\PartialSB-MartinDow\\Imports\\Sales Report ZSD002 - 2022-2026 YTD Mar - RR.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\(1\); $lastCol = $ws.UsedRange.Columns.Count; $headers = @\(\); for \($i = 1; $i -le $lastCol; $i++\) { $val = $ws.Cells.Item\(2, $i\).Text; $headers += "$i. $val" }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($excel\) | Out-Null; $headers)
